name_cn:
Sweet Pink in Stock!!️
Lady Diana Three-Compartment Limited Edition with Diamond Clasp, it looks so good. Brand new crystal letter diamond clasp, full of luxury. Who can refuse a bling bling Diana bag. Purely hand-set crystal letter clasp, full of exquisite details. Paired with classic quilted pattern and high-quality sheepskin. Charming, elegant, and full of presence. Can be worn crossbody or carried by hand, very feminine. Classic and stylish style, don't miss it
size:17*7*15cm
